selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
words.definition: s. with or in a close or intimate relationship

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 盖子, 封面, 藉口；vt. 覆盖, 掩饰, 保护, 掩护, 包括
words.definition: n. the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: n. 婚姻, 结婚, 婚礼, 合并
words.definition: n. the state of being a married couple voluntarily joined for life (or until divorce)

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: n. a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: a. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的
words.definition: a. obtainable or accessible and ready for use or service

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 新闻, 消息, 报导
words.definition: n. information about recent and important events

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 专辑, 专车, 号外, 特别的东西, 负有特别任务的人员；a. 特别的, 专门的, 特殊的, 额外的, 附加的, 特别亲密的
words.definition: n. a special offering (usually temporary and at a reduced price) that is featured in advertising

words.translation: n. 大学
words.definition: n. the body of faculty and students at a university

words.translation: a. 失去的, 遗失的, 迷惑的；lose的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: a. no longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered

words.translation: vi. 到达, 抵达
words.definition: v. reach a destination; arrive by movement or progress

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 角落, 转角, 窘境；vt. 迫至一隅, 垄断, 使陷入绝境
words.definition: n. a place off to the side of an area

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: n. 梦, 空想, 愿望；v. 做梦, 想象, 梦想
words.definition: n. a series of mental images and emotions occurring during sleep

words.translation: a. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；vt. 把...弄干
words.definition: n. a reformer who opposes the use of intoxicating beverages

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: a. 出名的, 极好的
words.definition: s widely known and esteemed

words.translation: a. 平坦的, 单调的, 无力的, 浅的, 萧条的, 干脆的, 无聊的；adv. 平直地, 断然地
words.definition: n. a level tract of land

words.translation: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 贿赂；vt. 使结冰, 冰镇, 覆以糖衣

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 英里, 很大距离；[机] 英里, 哩
words.definition: n. a unit of length equal to 1,760 yards or 5,280 feet; exactly 1609.344 meters

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: n. 传播, 散布, 伸展；a. 双唇展开的, 伸展的
words.definition: n. process or result of distributing or extending over a wide expanse of space

words.translation: n. 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 铭文, 表格, 表, 高原, 平地层；vt. 搁置, 嵌合, 制表, 把...列入议事日程
words.definition: n. a set of data arranged in rows and columns

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 部门, 系, 机关
words.definition: n. a specialized division of a large organization

words.translation: a. 活着的, 活泼的, 敏感的, 热闹的
words.definition: a. possessing life

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的
words.definition: v. move so that an opening or passage is obstructed; make shut

words.translation: n. 挑战, 挑动, 大胆；v. 敢, 胆敢
words.definition: n. a challenge to do something dangerous or foolhardy

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: n. 图书馆, 藏书, 库
words.definition: n. a room where books are kept

words.translation: n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的
words.definition: n. (physics) electromagnetic radiation that can produce a visual sensation

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地

words.translation: a. 可爱的, 有趣的

words.translation: n. 肉, 餐, 食物

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡

words.translation: n. 充分, 很多, 丰富；a. 很多的, 足够的, 丰富的

words.translation: n. 赞美, 称赞, 崇拜；vt. 称赞, 赞美

words.translation: n. 味道, 气味, 嗅觉, 嗅, 臭味, 气息；vt. 闻, 探出, 察觉, 发出...的气味

words.translation: n. 水流, 小河, 流出, 趋势, 人潮；vt. 流出, 流动, 展开
words.definition: n. a natural body of running water flowing on or under the earth

words.translation: n. 带子, 队, 乐队；v. 联合, 结合

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映

words.translation: n. 赛跑, 流出, 运转；a. 流动的, 跑着的, 连续的

words.translation: n. 串联, 序列, 连续, 系列, 丛书, 套, 级数, 组

words.translation: n. 风格, 时尚, 文体, 风度, 字体, 类型；vt. 称呼, (根据新款式)设计, 使合潮流

words.translation: a. 活泼的, 鲜明的, 生动的

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的

words.translation: n. 排, 行, 街道, 划船, 吵闹；vt. 使成排, 划, 划船, 参加(赛船), 痛骂

words.translation: n. 声音, 语音, 吵闹, 声调, 听力范围, 探条, 海峡；a. 健全的, 可靠的, 合理的, 健康的, 彻底的, 资金充实的

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的

words.translation: a. 历史的, 史实的, 历史上的

words.definition: n the work of cleansing (usually with soap and water)

words.translation: n. 网, 蛛丝, 蹼, 织物, 圈套, 卷筒纸；vi. 结网, 形成网
words.definition: n. an intricate network suggesting something that was formed by weaving or interweaving

words.definition: n. an utterance made by exhaling audibly

words.translation: a. 姓氏不详的, 无名的, 无特色的
words.definition: a. having no known name or identity or known source

words.translation: n. 亲爱的, 可爱的人, 可爱的物；a. 可爱的, 亲爱的

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: a. 光亮的, 了不起的, 灿烂的, 壮丽的, 显著的, 杰出的
words.definition: s having great beauty and splendor

words.translation: a. 继续的, 延续的
words.definition: a. without stop or interruption

words.translation: n. 乔治（男子名）；自动操纵装置；英国最高勋爵勋章上的圣乔治诛龙图
words.definition: n. Christian martyr; patron saint of England; hero of the legend of Saint George and the Dragon in which he slew a dragon and saved a princess (?-303)

words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose
